title: rubus hirtus var. spinuliflorens
intro: Rubus hirtus var. spinuliflorens, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. spinuliflorens include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried into capsules or powders for oral consumption.
